mechanism_narrative: Higher 3-month momentum in industrial production signals that the earnings cycle is moving from contraction to recovery, causing investors to raise near-term profit expectations and producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:INDPRO latest snapshot is 98.4622 as of 2009-09
failure_condition: Reject if rising 3-month INDPRO momentum is followed by positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in 50% or fewer triggered observations, or if the rolling 3-year Rank IC is below 0.03.

mechanism_narrative: A crossing of the unemployment rate above 10% signals severe labor-market slack and pressure on household income, causing investors to mark down revenue growth and producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:UNRATE latest snapshot is 10.2 as of 2009-10
failure_condition: Reject if UNRATE crossings above 10.0% are followed by positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of cases or if average triggered returns exceed the unconditional average.

mechanism_narrative: When the federal funds rate is pinned near zero and CPI inflation is not accelerating, the low discount-rate channel dominates inflation risk, raising equity duration values and producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS < 0.25 and CPIAUCSL 3-month annualized change <= prior 6-month annualized change
evidence_refs: fact:FEDFUNDS latest snapshot is 0.12 as of 2009-10
failure_condition: Reject if the joint low-rate and non-accelerating-CPI condition has no positive return spread versus baseline over 60 trading days, or if the spread is negative in two consecutive walk-forward windows.

mechanism_narrative: Higher short-term growth in retail sales signals improving household demand before it is fully reflected in quarterly earnings, leading to upward revisions in cyclical revenue expectations and positive S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:RSAFS latest snapshot is 344688 as of 2009-09
failure_condition: Reject if positive 1-month or 3-month RSAFS momentum is not associated with higher 5-day S&P 500 returns than negative momentum in at least 60% of walk-forward test windows.

mechanism_narrative: A rebound in housing starts from extremely depressed levels signals stabilization in construction, credit transmission, and durable-goods demand, producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: HOUST crosses above its 6-month moving average while HOUST < 700
evidence_refs: fact:HOUST latest snapshot is 590 as of 2009-09
failure_condition: Reject if HOUST rebounds from below 700 fail to deliver positive 60-day S&P 500 returns more often than not, or if their average return is not above the unconditional 60-day average.

mechanism_narrative: If CPI inflation accelerates while the federal funds rate remains near zero, investors price earlier policy normalization and margin pressure, compressing valuation multiples and producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL 3-month annualized change crosses above 2.5% while FEDFUNDS < 0.25
failure_condition: Reject if CPI acceleration above the threshold with FEDFUNDS below 0.25 is followed by non-negative average 20-day S&P 500 returns or if downside hit rate is below 55%.

mechanism_narrative: When unemployment is very high but payroll losses are moderating, equities look through the lagging unemployment rate and reprice toward recovery in operating leverage, producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE > 9.0 and PAYEMS 3-month change improves versus the prior 3-month change
evidence_refs: fact:PAYEMS latest snapshot is 130848 as of 2009-10
failure_condition: Reject if the high-UNRATE and improving-PAYEMS condition produces 60-day returns below the unconditional average in more than half of walk-forward windows.

mechanism_narrative: A downside reversal in industrial production after a recovery attempt signals that inventory restocking has stalled, causing investors to cut near-term earnings expectations and producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO crosses below its 3-month moving average
failure_condition: Reject if INDPRO downside reversals are followed by positive 5-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of cases or if their average return is statistically indistinguishable from zero.
